details: Cu(II) complex blue crystals mp 188-190°C confirmed in Experimental section of Molecules 2003 8(11) 780-787; DOI 10.3390/81100780 in paper.

(Sp)-4a paracyclophane bisphosphine oxide M.p. 164-165°C confirmed in Molecules 2026 31, 494; DOI matches.
Phenanthrene Tm = 372.4 K in Table 1 of Brown 2000; conversion 372.4 - 273.15 = 99.25°C correct.
DM(3) where DM=2,6-Dimethyl, Z=Tosyl: 'Azide dec. temp.' 94°C confirmed in Table 1 of Molecules 2002, 7(2); decomposition property correct.
Choline acetate mp 81°C confirmed in Liu 2020 Molecules 25, 1691; DOI matches.
TCMTB melting point <-10°C confirmed in book chapter (Pulp and Paper Industry, ch. 8); DOI substring present.
5k 6-((6-nitrobenzo[d][1,3]dioxol-5-yl)methyl)-6H-benzo[c]chromene Mp: 234°C confirmed in PMC12943095.
10d White crystals, 75%, mp 225-226°C confirmed in Pharmaceuticals 2011 4, 1158 PMC4058664.
Piroxicam-saccharine sodium 1:2 cocrystal mp 178-179°C in Table 2 of Khan 2017 Adv Pharm Bull; DOI matches.
6b 1-(2-(Benzyloxy)-5-chloro-4-methylphenyl)ethan-1-one mp 76-78°C in ACS Omega (DOI 10.1021/acsomega.6c01037 in paper); citation year in row says 2017 but DOI is present.
5,5-di-i-propylbarbiturate Tm (Expt.) 227.5°C in Mitchell 2008 SI dataset; main paper DOI ci700307p present.
5,5-diethyl-2-thiobarbiturate Tm (Expt.) 180.0°C in Mitchell 2008 SI dataset; DOI ci700307p present.
Ethyl diclofenac-diclofenac acid 4:6 mixture mp 82.1°C in Table 3 of Khan 2019 Heliyon; DOI matches. Note: mixture not discrete compound (Phase 2 quality issue), but Q1-Q4 all pass.
Compound 5c N,N-bis-[(3,5-dimetyl-4-iodo-1H-pyrazol-1-yl)-methyl]-4-bromoaniline (paper has typo 'dimetyl'; row corrects to 'dimethyl') mp 113-114°C in Antibiotics 2026 15, 127; DOI matches.
7e 3-Amino-4-imino-5,7-di(4-chlorophenyl)-7H-pyrrolo[2,3-d]pyrimidine mp 224-25°C in Molecules 2002 7(7); range expansion to 224-225 correct.
2-ethyl-1-butanol Bp exp 146.50°C in Table 8 of PMC6146921 (Molecules 2003); compiled experimental.
6-Bromoisatin Mp 270°C cited from ref [118] in Tyrian Purple review Molecules 2001, 6, 736-769; DOI matches.
1-(2,4,6-Trimethylbenzenesulfonyl)-1H-pyrrolo[2,3-c]pyridine (24c) mp 132-134°C in Zhou 2013 J Med Chem; DOI 10.1021/jm3014162 in paper.

3-(2-furanyl)-6-(2-aminophenyl)-1,2,4-triazolo[3,4-b]-1,3,4-thiadiazole (2q) M.p. 144-146°C in Molecules 2002 7, 681-689; DOI matches.
Dibenzo[b,f][1,4]thiazepine (3d) yellow solid mp 106-107°C in SI of Norouzi 2024 Beilstein J Org Chem 20.241; DOI matches.
6g Methyl-2-[2-(5-benzyl-4-phenyl-4H-[1,2,4]triazol-3-thio)acetylamino]-3-(4-hydroxyphenyl)-propionate mp 117°C in Molecules 2010 15, 6759; DOI matches.
Aminomethylenebisphosphonic acid (1) m.p. 258-260°C in Pharmaceuticals 2026 19, 256 PMC12943640; DOI matches.
